Video.summary: Flip Wilson and Vikki Carr choose to accept Carol's mission: to appear in the spoof "Mission: Improbable".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Flip Wilson, Vikki Carr

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell plays a filmmaker in an operating room, and meets Carol. Also: a shift with Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.
Video.title: Ethel Merman, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his eleventh and final season premiere guest star spot!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard and Tim Conway appear on the game show spoof "The Dater's Game".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Kay Ballard

Video.summary: Michele Lee headlines a wonderful production number, which also offers a visit with the 10th Street Family.
Video.title: Michele Lee

Video.summary: Carol offers a trio of guests: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Mel Torme and Martha Raye guest. Featuring Martha and Carol as dog-lovers, and spoofs of Disney classics.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Tim has to write a eulogy for his best friend. On "As The Stomach Turns", things turn bionic after a funeral.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest John Byner plays both a villain and a trial witness. On "Carol & Sis", The Bradfords join a group.
Video.title: John Byner

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence, The Captain & Tennille appear in spoofs, while Steve and Carol reveal a secretary's thoughts.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence is your MC for a roast of Nora Desmond. In "Carol & Sis", Vicki helps sober up a tipsy Carol.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Features Harvey as a man faking whiplash. On "The Family", Mama, Ed, and Eunice are invited to Mickey's place.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Ruth Buzzi guest, with Buzzi as Chris' friend in "Carol & Sis", and Tim and Carol as survivors.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ruth Buzzi

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins out for lunch.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters crashes Q&A. Sid Caesar teaches Carol self-defense, then joins the gang for a spoof.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as the teacher of Eunice and Bubba in "The Family." Also: a remodeled kitchen falls apart.
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Tonight's guest: Mr. Steve Lawrence!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Natalie Cole are tonight's guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Natalie Cole, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Mel Torme guest. Coca and Carol are wives of rivals, and Torme is Igor in a Dracula sketch.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Guests Steve Lawrence and Bernadette Peters each team up with Carol in another delightful night of comedy.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as Tim's girlfriend in a sketch where he is honored with a ship. And, a spoof of "Jaws."
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Jack Palance guests, appearing in a gangster sketch. Carol and Roger meet Chris' new beau in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Jack Palance

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Dick Martin appear in a tribute to movie detectives, and Carol & Vicki are ready to mingle.
Video.title: Anthony Newley, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Pat Carroll guest. Tim plays Lone Ranger & a man who lives a dog's life. Pat joins "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray guest. Featuring commercial parodies and the movie "The Lavender Pimpernel."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: When Mama and The Family play Charades, things turn to chaos. Also: a despondent bar patron meets her match.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Tim Conway star. Features spoof "The Dater's Game", and Tim as a service station attendant.
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Cher stars! Includes Harvey and Tom as dueling pianists, commercial spoofs, and a love triangle.
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers, steals scenes as an extra, and steals a mint.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: John Byner & Francine Beers star! Includes a convict seeking refuge, Carol & Vicki as robots, & "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: John Byner, Francine Beers

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in "As The Stomach Turns." Q&A and a contest reveals stiff completion.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Tim Conway star. Features singles out on the town, and "Arrivaderci Summertime."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: The conclusion of the fifth-season "Family Show" finale brings to a close the spoof "The Doily Sisters."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers

Video.summary: Joanne Woodward spends an evening with "The Family." Joanne plays a past schoolmate of Eunice's.
Video.title: Joanne Woodward
